MINI MINUTES:

Daniel R. Weltin for plaintiff and moving party Maria Espinosa

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted with modification: Plaintiff Espinosa's motion to compel responses to interrogatories and the deposition of Reginald Jones is denied. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied.
Modification: re: re-open discovery.
